creator: rnoland@2hip.net
text:
On Sun, 2006-12-31 at 13:43 +0100, Pav Lucistnik wrote:
> Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port sysutils/portmanager, the following
> problem report has been filed against your port
> 
>   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=106643
> 
> Can you please provide feedback on this?

I know almost nothing about ruby, but as near as I can tell... This
really looks like an issue with pkgtools.

# ruby -d /usr/local/share/portmanager/pkgtools-to-portmanager.rb
Exception `LoadError'
at /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/pkgtools.rb:34 - no such file to
load -- features/ruby18/file
Exception `LoadError' at /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/pkgmisc.rb:31
- no such file to load -- features/ruby18/dir
Exception `LoadError' at /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/pkginfo.rb:33
- no such file to load -- features/ruby18/file
Exception `LoadError' at /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/tmpdir.rb:12 - no such
file to load -- Win32API
Exception `LoadError' at /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:33
- no such file to load -- features/ruby18/file
CATEGORY/PORT|OPTION=|          # do not delete this line!
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/pkgtools.rb:1089: warning: global
variable `$portsdb' not initialized
Exception `NoMethodError'
at /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/pkgtools.rb:1089 - undefined method
`x11base' for nil:NilClass
** Error occured reading /usr/local/etc/pkgtools.conf:
        undefined method `x11base' for nil:NilClass

robert.
